svg.title: SGSC-Net Phase 1 architecture diagram
svg.desc: Full data flow of SGSC-Net Phase 1 showing input HSI patch, Module 1 spectral encoder with bidirectional SSM and NIR wedge separator, Module 2 dual-scale spatial context with local and global 3D-CNN branches and scalar gate, feature concatenation, MLP classifier, and cross-entropy loss output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the input patch format for SGSC-Net?')

text.style: fill: rgb(83, 74, 183); --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-534ab7, #5777b5);;fill:rgb(83, 74, 183);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:central

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the bidirectional Mamba SSM work in SGSC-Net?')
sendPrompt('What does the NIR wedge separator do for road and building confusion?')
sendPrompt('How are SSM and NIR features combined in the spectral encoder?')

g.text: unmix head stub (B,2) — activated in Phase 2

text.style: fill: rgb(29, 158, 117); --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1d9e75, #60d8b2);;fill:rgb(29, 158, 117);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:central

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the local 7×7 branch learn in SGSC-Net?')
sendPrompt('What does the global 25×25 branch learn in SGSC-Net?')
sendPrompt('How does the scalar gate work and why did it collapse in Phase 1?')
sendPrompt('What is the gated fusion formula in SGSC-Net module 2?')

text.style: fill: rgb(83, 74, 183); --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-534ab7, #5777b5);;fill:rgb(83, 74, 183);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

fill: rgb(29, 158, 117); --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-1d9e75, #60d8b2);;fill:rgb(29, 158, 117);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are spectral and spatial features concatenated in SGSC-Net?')
sendPrompt('What is the MLP classifier head architecture in SGSC-Net?')
sendPrompt('What loss function does SGSC-Net Phase 1 use?')
sendPrompt('What metrics does SGSC-Net Phase 1 achieve on OHID-1?')
